subject: Son Goku in Super Saiyan transformation, screaming mid-transformation with energy erupting around him
description: A muscular humanoid figure with spiky golden hair screams with mouth wide open as crackling yellow-white energy erupts around them in a massive aura. The figure is shown from the waist up, body tensed and arms partially raised at their sides. The background is consumed by the energy release — blazing white-gold light radiating outward with streaks of orange and yellow. The composition is all kinetic force and outward explosion, the figure at the center of the blast.
foreground: muscular figure with golden spiky hair, screaming, arms out, engulfed in energy aura
background: explosive energy burst, radiating light, abstract flame-like streaks
emotion: screaming, explosive rage, full body tension — pure outward force
